name: List all scientists with their departments, specialization names and gender
sql:
SELECT s.employee_id, s.scientist_name, g.gender_name, d.department_name, sp.specialization_name
FROM scientist_details s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.gender_id
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN department_specialization sp 
  ON s.specialization_id = sp.specialization_id

name: Show scientists, the equipment assigned to them, and the assignment date
sql:
SELECT s.scientist_name, d.department_name, e.equipment_name, ea.assignment_date
FROM equipment_assignment ea
JOIN scientist_details s ON ea.employee_id = s.employee_id
JOIN lab_equipment e ON ea.serial_number = e.serial_number
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
ORDER BY s.scientist_name

name: All equipment with the supplier details
sql:
SELECT e.equipment_name, sd.supplier_name
FROM lab_equipment e 
JOIN supplier_details sd ON e.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id

name: Materials and supplier name
sql:
SELECT lm.material_name, sd.supplier_name
FROM lab_materials lm
JOIN supplier_details sd ON lm.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id

name: Scientists with their full profile
sql:
SELECT s.employee_id, s.scientist_name, s.scientist_age, g.gender_name, d.department_name, sp.specialization_name
FROM scientist_details s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.gender_id
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN department_specialization sp ON s.specialization_id = sp.specialization_id
ORDER BY d.department_name, s.scientist_name

name: All equipment used in the Physics department
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT e.equipment_name
FROM lab_equipment e
JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id
WHERE d.department_name = 'Physics'

name: Suppliers who supply both equipment and materials
sql:
SELECT DISTINCT sd.supplier_name
FROM supplier_details sd
JOIN lab_equipment e ON sd.supplier_id = e.supplier_id
JOIN lab_materials lm ON sd.supplier_id = lm.supplier_id

name: Equipment assignments
sql:
SELECT ea.assignment_id, ea.assignment_date, s.scientist_name, d.department_name, e.equipment_name, e.equipment_cost
FROM equipment_assignment ea
JOIN scientist_details s ON ea.employee_id = s.employee_id
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN lab_equipment e ON ea.serial_number = e.serial_number
ORDER BY ea.assignment_date DESC

name: All assignments with the scientist name and equipment name
sql:
SELECT ea.assignment_id, s.scientist_name, e.equipment_name
FROM equipment_assignment ea
JOIN scientist_details s ON ea.employee_id = s.employee_id 
JOIN lab_equipment e ON ea.serial_number = e.serial_number

name: Material requests with scientist names, department name, quantity and request date
sql:
SELECT mr.request_id, s.scientist_name, d.department_name, lm.material_name, mr.material_quantity, mr.request_date
FROM material_requests mr
JOIN scientist_details s ON mr.employee_id = s.employee_id
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN lab_materials lm ON mr.reference_number = lm.reference_number
ORDER BY mr.request_date DESC

name: Purchases with the supplier names, material names, quantity and purchase date
sql:
SELECT lm.material_name, sd.supplier_name, pd.material_quantity, pd.purchase_date
FROM purchase_details pd
JOIN lab_materials lm ON pd.reference_number = lm.reference_number
JOIN supplier_details sd ON pd.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id
ORDER BY pd.purchase_date DESC

name: All departments and their specializations
sql:
SELECT d.department_name, sp.specialization_name
FROM departments d
JOIN department_specialization sp ON d.department_id = sp.department_id

name: Purchases and material cost
sql:
SELECT pd.purchase_id, pd.purchase_date, lm.material_name, pd.material_quantity, lm.material_cost, pd.material_quantity * lm.material_cost AS estimated_total_cost, sd.supplier_name
FROM purchase_details pd
JOIN lab_materials lm ON pd.reference_number = lm.reference_number
JOIN supplier_details sd ON pd.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id
ORDER BY pd.purchase_date DESC

name: Departments with their scientists and equipment
sql:
SELECT d.department_name, s.scientist_name, e.equipment_name
FROM departments d
LEFT JOIN scientist_details s ON d.department_id = s.department_id
LEFT JOIN lab_equipment e ON d.department_id = e.department_id
ORDER BY d.department_name, s.scientist_name

name: All suppliers located in Nairobi and what they supply
sql:
SELECT sd.supplier_name, e.equipment_name, lm.material_name
FROM supplier_details sd
LEFT JOIN lab_equipment e ON sd.supplier_id = e.supplier_id
LEFT JOIN lab_materials lm ON sd.supplier_id = lm.supplier_id
WHERE sd.supplier_location = 'Nairobi'

name: Count the number of scientists per department
sql:
SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(*) AS total_scientists
FROM scientist_details s
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Count the number of equipment per department
sql:
SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(*) AS total_equipment
FROM lab_equipment e
JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Find average age of scientists per department
sql:
SELECT d.department_name, AVG(s.scientist_age) AS avg_age
FROM scientist_details s
JOIN departments d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Count how many materials each supplier provides
sql:
SELECT sd.supplier_name, COUNT(*) AS materials_supplied
FROM lab_materials lm
JOIN supplier_details sd ON lm.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id
GROUP BY sd.supplier_name

name: Find total cost of equipment in each department
sql:
SELECT d.department_name, SUM(e.equipment_cost) AS total_cost
FROM lab_equipment e 
JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY d.department_name

name: Count number of assignments per scientist
sql:
SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS assignments 
FROM equipment_assignment
GROUP BY employee_id

name: Find most requested material
sql:
SELECT reference_number, COUNT(*) AS total_requests
FROM material_requests
GROUP BY reference_number
ORDER BY total_requests DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

name: Count purchases for each supplier
sql:
SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(*) AS purchases
FROM purchase_details
GROUP BY supplier_id

name: Find total material quantities requested
sql:
SELECT SUM(material_quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM material_requests

name: Average material request quantity
sql:
SELECT AVG(material_quantity) AS avg_quantity
FROM material_requests

name: Count scientists per gender
sql:
SELECT g.gender_name, COUNT(*) AS total_scientists 
FROM scientist_details s
JOIN gender g ON s.gender_id = g.gender_id
GROUP BY g.gender_name

name: Count specializations per department
sql:
SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) AS specializations
FROM department_specialization
GROUP BY department_id

name: Departments with more than 5 scientists
sql:
SELECT department_id, COUNT(*) AS total_scientists 
FROM scientist_details
GROUP BY department_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5

name: Suppliers who supply more than 3 materials
sql:
SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(*) AS total_materials
FROM lab_materials
GROUP BY supplier_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 3

name: Scientists with more than 1 equipment assigned
sql:
SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS total_equipment_assigned
FROM equipment_assignment
GROUP BY employee_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

name: Materials requested more than 10 times
sql:
SELECT reference_number, COUNT(*) AS total_requests
FROM material_requests
GROUP BY reference_number
HAVING COUNT(*) > 10

name: Departments with average age above 40
sql:
SELECT department_id, AVG(scientist_age) AS average_age
FROM scientist_details
GROUP BY department_id
HAVING AVG(scientist_age) > 40

name: Suppliers with more than 2 purchases
sql:
SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(*) AS total_purchases
FROM purchase_details
GROUP BY supplier_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

name: Equipment used more than once
sql:
SELECT serial_number, COUNT(*) AS total_assignments
FROM equipment_assignment
GROUP BY serial_number
HAVING COUNT(*) > 1

name: Materials requested in quantities greater than 50 in total
sql:
SELECT reference_number, SUM(material_quantity) AS total_quantity
FROM material_requests
GROUP BY reference_number
HAVING SUM(material_quantity) > 50

name: Scientists who made more than 2 requests
sql:
SELECT employee_id, COUNT(*) AS total_requests
FROM material_requests
GROUP BY employee_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

name: Gender groups with more than 5 scientists
sql:
SELECT gender_id, COUNT(*) AS total_scientists
FROM scientist_details 
GROUP BY gender_id
HAVING COUNT(*) > 5

name: Suppliers who supply more than one material
sql:
SELECT supplier_id, COUNT(DISTINCT reference_number) AS total_materials_supplied
FROM lab_materials
GROUP BY supplier_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT reference_number) > 1

name: Find scientists older than average age
sql:
SELECT * FROM scientist_details
WHERE scientist_age > (SELECT AVG(scientist_age) FROM scientist_details)

name: Find equipment that costs more than the average cost
sql:
SELECT * FROM lab_equipment
WHERE equipment_cost > (SELECT AVG(equipment_cost) FROM lab_equipment)

name: List of scientists who never requested materials
sql:
SELECT * FROM scientist_details s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM material_requests mr WHERE mr.employee_id = s.employee_id)

name: List suppliers who never supplied materials
sql:
SELECT *
FROM supplier_details sd
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM lab_materials lm
  WHERE lm.supplier_id = sd.supplier_id
)

name: Find the most expensive equipment
sql:
SELECT * FROM lab_equipment
WHERE equipment_cost = (SELECT MAX(equipment_cost) FROM lab_equipment)

name: Find scientists in department with highest number of scientists
sql:
SELECT * FROM scientist_details
WHERE department_id = (
 SELECT department_id
 FROM scientist_details
 GROUP BY department_id
 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
 FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY)

name: Find material with highest total requests
sql:
SELECT reference_number
FROM material_requests
GROUP BY reference_number
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
 SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (
   SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM material_requests GROUP BY reference_number) x)

name: Find department with highest equipment cost
sql:
SELECT department_id
FROM lab_equipment
GROUP BY department_id
HAVING SUM(equipment_cost) = (
 SELECT MAX(total) FROM (
   SELECT SUM(equipment_cost) total FROM lab_equipment GROUP BY department_id) x)

name: Find scientists with no equipment assigned
sql:
SELECT * FROM scientist_details s
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
 SELECT 1 FROM equipment_assignment ea WHERE ea.employee_id = s.employee_id)

name: Find suppliers with the highest purchases
sql:
SELECT supplier_id
FROM purchase_details
GROUP BY supplier_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
 SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (
   SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM purchase_details GROUP BY supplier_id) x)

name: Find specialization with most scientists
sql:
SELECT specialization_id
FROM scientist_details
GROUP BY specialization_id
HAVING COUNT(*) = (
 SELECT MAX(cnt) FROM (
   SELECT COUNT(*) cnt FROM scientist_details GROUP BY specialization_id) x)

name: Find materials never requested
sql:
SELECT * FROM lab_materials lm
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM material_requests mr WHERE mr.reference_number = lm.reference_number)
